metadata.siteDescription: Finding beauty in the digital world.
metadata.aboutDescription: 19-year-old IT student from the Netherlands with a passion for technology, software and digital design.

aboutCard.title: About
aboutCard.paragraph1: I'm Jesse Kramer, a 19-year-old IT student from the Netherlands with a passion for technology, software and digital design.
aboutCard.paragraph2: I'm always exploring new ideas, building personal projects and learning something new.

aboutPage.title: About me
aboutPage.paragraph1: My name is Jesse Kramer, and I'm a 19-year-old IT student from the Netherlands.
aboutPage.paragraph2: Technology has been one of my biggest interests for as long as I can remember. I enjoy exploring new software, building personal projects and learning about the technologies shaping the future. Artificial intelligence, web development, user interface design and cloud technologies are some of the areas that inspire me the most.
aboutPage.paragraph3: Outside of technology, I enjoy travelling, discovering new places, photography, gaming and music. I'm fascinated by clean design and digital experiences that are not only functional, but also visually appealing. That philosophy is reflected throughout this website.
aboutPage.paragraph4: This website serves as my digital home—a place where I share projects, write about topics that interest me and document my journey as I continue to learn and grow.
aboutPage.paragraph5: Looking ahead, I hope to build a career in IT where I can combine technology, creativity and problem-solving. Whether that's as a consultant, solution architect or working on innovative software, my goal is to create technology that makes a real difference.
aboutPage.paragraph6: Thank you for visiting my website.
